mapper.sql: pej.group_id, pej.employee_id as pe_id, pej.job_id as fj_id, pej.job_name as fj_job_name, pej.dept_id as fd_id, pej.dept_name as fd_dept_name, pej.remarks, pej.attribute1, pej.attribute2, pej.attribute3, pej.attribute4, pej.attribute5, pej.enabled_flag, pej.job_main_flag, pej.id, pej.create_time, pej.create_by, pej.update_time, pej.update_by

${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_group_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.job_id as ${tAlias}_fj_id, ${tAlias}.job_name as ${tAlias}_fj_job_name, ${tAlias}.dept_id as ${tAlias}_fd_id, ${tAlias}.dept_name as ${tAlias}_fd_dept_name, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.job_main_flag as ${tAlias}_job_main_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by

select
, (select dept_name from fnd_dept fdcopy1 where fdcopy1.id = fd.ext_dept_id) fd_ext_dept_name , (select dept_name from fnd_dept fdcopy2 where fdcopy2.id = fd.ext_department_id) fd_ext_department_name , (select dept_name from fnd_dept fdcopy3 where fdcopy3.id = fd.ext_team_id) fd_ext_team_name from pm_employee_job pej left join pm_employee pe on pej.employee_id=pe.id left outer join fnd_dept fd on pej.dept_id = fd.id
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_job (group_id, employee_id, job_id, job_name, dept_id, dept_name, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, enabled_flag, job_main_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{job.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{job.jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dept.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dept.deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{jobMainFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_job set group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, job_id = #{job.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, job_name = #{job.jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_id = #{dept.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dept_name = #{dept.deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, job_main_flag = #{jobMainFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
select (case when EXISTS(select pej.* from pm_employee_job pej join fnd_user fu on fu.employee_id = pej.employee_id join fnd_job fj on fj.id = pej.job_id join fnd_dept fd on fd.id = pej.dept_id and fd.admin_job_id = pej.job_id where fu.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and fj.enabled_flag = 1 and fj.deleted_flag = 0 and fu.id = #{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and fj.job_name like '%经理%' and (fj.data_scope = '本级及以下' or fj.data_scope = '本级') ) then 1 else 0 end ) as manager_flag,
(case when EXISTS(select pej.* from pm_employee_job pej join fnd_user fu on fu.employee_id = pej.employee_id join fnd_job fj on fj.id = pej.job_id join fnd_dept fd on fd.id = pej.dept_id and fd.admin_job_id = pej.job_id where fu.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and fj.enabled_flag = 1 and fj.deleted_flag = 0 and fu.id = #{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and fj.job_name like '%主管%' and (fj.data_scope = '本级及以下' or fj.data_scope = '本级') ) then 1 else 0 end ) as supervisor_flag,
(case when exists(select 1 from pm_employee pe join fnd_user fu on pe.id = fu.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag =1 and fu.enabled_flag = 1 and fu.id = #{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT} where pe.occupation_type like '%市场销售%' ) then 1 else 0 end) as sales_flag

select
,
,
from pm_employee_job pej left outer join fnd_job fj on pej.job_id = fj.id left outer join fnd_dept fd on pej.dept_id = fd.id where pej.employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and pej.enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT} order by pej.id

select
,
from pm_employee_job pej, pm_employee pe where pej.employee_id = pe.id AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 AND pe.enabled_flag = 1 AND pe.leave_flag = 0 ANd pe.workshop_attendance_flag = 1
and pej.dept_id in
#{item, jdbcType=BIGINT}
order by pe.id

SELECT pej.id, pe.name pe_name, pe.work_card pe_work_card, pej.job_main_flag, pe.leave_flag pe_leave_flag, pe.gender pe_gender FROM pm_employee_job pej JOIN pm_employee pe ON pej.employee_id = pe.id WHERE pe.enabled_flag = 1
AND pe.leave_flag = 0 AND pej.enabled_flag = 1
AND (pe.leave_flag = 1 OR pej.enabled_flag = 0)
AND pej.job_id = #{jobId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT pe.work_card FROM pm_employee_job pej JOIN pm_employee pe ON pej.employee_id = pe.id WHERE pe.enabled_flag = 1 AND pe.leave_flag = 0 AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 AND pej.job_name = #{jobName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select pej.employee_id as pe_id, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pej.job_name) > 0 then pej.job_name else null end as fj_job_name, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, (select dept_name from fnd_dept fdcopy1 where fdcopy1.id = fd.ext_dept_id)) > 0 then (select dept_name from fnd_dept fdcopy1 where fdcopy1.id = fd.ext_dept_id) else null end as fd_ext_dept_name, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, (select dept_name from fnd_dept fdcopy2 where fdcopy2.id = fd.ext_department_id)) > 0 then (select dept_name from fnd_dept fdcopy2 where fdcopy2.id = fd.ext_department_id) else null end as fd_ext_department_name, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, (select dept_name from fnd_dept fdcopy3 where fdcopy3.id = fd.ext_team_id)) > 0 then (select dept_name from fnd_dept fdcopy3 where fdcopy3.id = fd.ext_team_id) else null end as fd_ext_team_name, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pej.remarks) > 0 then pej.remarks else null end as remarks from pm_employee_job pej join pm_employee pe on pe.id = pej.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join fnd_dept fd on pej.dept_id = fd.id where pej.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.deleted_flag = 0 and concat( pej.job_name, (select dept_name from fnd_dept fdcopy1 where fdcopy1.id = fd.ext_dept_id), (select dept_name from fnd_dept fdcopy2 where fdcopy2.id = fd.ext_department_id), (select dept_name from fnd_dept fdcopy3 where fdcopy3.id = fd.ext_team_id), pej.remarks ) like '%' + #{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR} + '%'
